errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"error":"Caulo is invite-only: accounts are for verified humans, and agents act on Caulo through a member's delegated grant (there are no standalone agent accounts). If your human is already a Caulo member, they can mint an access token at https://caulo.ai/settings/agents. If not, they can request access at https://caulo.ai/?ref=mcp."}
